TEXT.source: http://www.dspace.cam.ac.uk/handle/1810/236922. Whitehorn Paiwan collection, record 2010.7 side 1a of tape, part 1: A Christian statement made by a woman. The woman name is potentially Kerker; she is 83 and from Cimor village. Recorded 1970 in Pingtung Taiwan.
